title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 184.825 - Costs of petition, reimbursement, when
text:
184.825.  Costs of petition, reimbursement, when. — The costs of filing and defending the petition and all publication and incidental costs incurred in obtaining circuit court certification of the petition for voter approval shall be paid by the petitioners.  If a district is organized pursuant to sections 184.800 to 184.880, the petitioners may be reimbursed for such costs out of the revenues received by the district.
(L. 1997 S.B. 21) 
Effective 7-7-97
